overall.description: A first-person walk along a sunny beach in GTA V, starting with views of the ocean and a distant coastal town, then turning left to walk alongside vegetated sand dunes. The scene features clear blue skies, bright sunlight, and empty sandy shores with calm ocean waters.

wide expanse of light-colored sand covering the foreground
distant buildings and structures along the coastline across the water
green forested hills rising behind the coastal settlement

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a peaceful walk along an empty sandy beach under clear blue skies. The ocean stretches out to the right with gentle waves lapping at the shore, while a distant coastal town and green hills are visible on the left horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach with vegetated dunes on the left

events.description: camera turns left to face the sand dunes while continuing to walk forward along the beach

agents.ego_description: turning left toward the sand dunes and continuing to walk along the beach path

entered.detail: grass-covered sand dunes with scattered green trees and bushes

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to reveal grass-covered sand dunes with scattered trees on the left side of the frame. The ocean and coastal town shift to the right side of the view as the walk continues along the beach, maintaining the bright sunny atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a bright, empty beach that shifts from an open ocean vista to a path bordered by coastal dunes. It begins with a peaceful stroll under clear blue skies, where gentle waves lap at the shore to the right and a distant coastal town rests against green hills on the horizon. As the camera turns left, the perspective pivots to reveal grass-covered sand dunes and scattered trees emerging on the left side of the frame. The scene then shifts the ocean and the distant town toward the right of the view while maintaining the bright, sunny atmosphere of the shoreline.
